field_notes.key: The official packet uses Identifier for the cookie key; this packet-support proof does not assert runtime cookie storage behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Configuration clientbound cookie_request packet framing and dispatch/decode for one Identifier key fixture only; do not infer cookie storage policy, cookie request/response runtime behavior, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
